---
title: "Richmond to EMB (43% Cycleway)"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Richmond" data-miles="29.66" data-elevation="1466.86" data-time="170" data-has-gravel="false">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Richmond</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>29.66</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1466.86 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:50</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.07 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fc8d59;">22%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>26.08</td>
      <td>88.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>1.08</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>1.02</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.87</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>0.54</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.07</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>737</td>
      <td>3.1</td>
      <td>26 ± 13</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. John T. Knox Freeway (2% avg)</td>
      <td>85</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Unknown Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>48</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Meadowsweet Drive (2% avg)</td>
      <td>211</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. South Street (3% avg)</td>
      <td>163</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Golden Gate Bridge (7% avg)</td>
      <td>230</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>737</td>
      <td>29.6</td>
      <td>170 ± 55</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.5</td>
      <td>13</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. John T. Knox Freeway (2% avg)</td>
      <td>85</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>7.0</td>
      <td>38</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Unknown Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>48</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.4</td>
      <td>13</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Meadowsweet Drive (2% avg)</td>
      <td>211</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>6.0</td>
      <td>32</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. South Street (3% avg)</td>
      <td>163</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Golden Gate Bridge (7% avg)</td>
      <td>230</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>7.4</td>
      <td>41</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>12.8</td>
      <td>43.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>3.6</td>
      <td>12.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>9.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>6.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>6.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>4.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>3.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>3.8</td>
      <td>12.8</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
